betterquesting:10.desc:8:
And just like that, the puzzle pieces start to fall together. The prophecy starts playing out.
The True tongue; the mysterius Fractallite force that rules Gallifrey, it called me here to become aware of this powerful language, which is itself a recursive field. A branch of magic no different than Thaumaturgy or Witchery.
And how fortuitous that the True Tongue is the true magic of the Arbiter, their tool for being an agent of Order; now, my tool for being an agent of Order.
Yes, it truly is all coming together.
At times, many times, I have been scared of my destiny. I did not want to feel imprisoned. I did not want my person to be defined by the words of somebody else. I wanted to be free of that prophecy.
And yet, now that things are playing out, I feel more free than I have ever felt before.
My actions are my own, they are me, they make sense. They correspond to my being.
It's not that I must be the Arbiter. It's not that I will be the Arbiter. I want to be the Arbiter.
